hero.title: Built to deliver trusted products across Saudi Arabia.
hero.body: ALNOURS is a Saudi-based food distribution company supplying premium FMCG products with reliable availability, clear pricing (VAT included), and smooth online ordering.

mission.title: Our mission
mission.body: Make everyday shopping simpler by providing trusted brands, accurate availability, and dependable fulfillment—so customers can order with confidence.

coverage.title: Coverage across Saudi Arabia
coverage.body: Based in Riyadh and serving customers across Saudi Arabia—including major cities like Jeddah.

whatWeDo.title: Distribution built for reliability.
whatWeDo.body: We bring trusted FMCG products to customers across Saudi Arabia through dependable supply, simple online ordering, and flexible fulfillment options.

distribution.title: Distribution & supply
distribution.body: Reliable FMCG supply across Saudi Arabia with consistent availability.

ordering.title: Online ordering
ordering.body: Browse products, choose size, and place your order in minutes.

fulfillment.title: Delivery or pickup
fulfillment.body: Flexible delivery or pickup options—whichever works for you.

contactCta.title: Let's plan your next order.
contactCta.body: Whether you're ordering for home or wholesale, we'll help you choose products, sizes, and delivery options—quickly and clearly.

top.title: Let's plan your next order.
top.body: Whether you're ordering for home or wholesale, we'll help you choose products, sizes, and delivery options—quickly and clearly.

form.title: Wholesale inquiry — tell us what you need.
form.body: Planning a large order? Share the products, quantities, preferred sizes, and delivery city. Our team will get back to you with availability and a tailored quote.

footer.aboutText: ALNOURS is a Saudi-based food distribution company supplying premium FMCG products to customers across the Kingdom. We focus on reliable availability, clear pricing, and fast fulfillment—serving individual shoppers and wholesale orders.

newsletter.title: Don't miss our latest quality updates
